actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (id=746320263) is KeyUnlockReceiver (script guid=c87167e8859f9dc4d98e818aab1910b1) attached to GameObject 'KeySocket' (fileID=746320259). It registers in Awake to XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered on component fileID=746320261. Serialized refs: doorController=fileID 1342851255, socketIndicatorRenderer=fileID 864473226, unlockedMaterial guid=7c38ca2c8b284d9439e0aeac6916567c. Since 'KeySocket' has a SphereCollider (isTrigger=1) and no Rigidbody, we cannot use Grab/Transform to naturally insert an interactable. Manually trigger the expected outcome of selectEntered by calling DoorController.Unlock(), which KeyUnlockReceiver would invoke upon item insertion. Expected behavior: hasUnlocked becomes true, door unlocked, socketIndicatorRenderer.sharedMaterial set to unlockedMaterial, and Debug.Log prints "[KeyUnlockReceiver] Item inserted — door unlocked!".
